instructions: Review entries, then set include_on_site to true. Run: python scripts/generate_html.py

vulnerabilities.title: Drupal Core
vulnerabilities.name: Drupal Core SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code execution via specially crafted requests sent with the database abstraction API.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
